meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategies to Solve No Project Ideas for Founders
content.seo_description: Stop guessing and start earning. Learn how to solve the 'no project ideas' dilemma by using SaaS pricing as a product discovery tool with Antigravity and Claude.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the perfect idea and start engineering for profit. By framing your MVP around specific pricing tiers, you force market validation. Use Antigravity to scaffold your infrastructure and Claude Code to iterate on revenue-generating features. Your pricing model is your best tool for identifying customer pain points.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’re spinning cycles on 'what to build' while the market is screaming for solutions that save time, reduce risk, or generate revenue. The secret isn't a flash of genius; it’s treating your SaaS pricing model as the architectural blueprint for your entire product.

When you anchor your development around a clear value proposition—priced for a specific buyer persona—the features define themselves. We’re moving beyond guessing. We’re using automated orchestration to build lean, high-conversion MVPs that don't just exist; they earn.

steps.title: Define the Value-Based Pricing Hook
steps.description: Before writing code, define a pricing tier that solves a high-cost problem. This focuses your development scope.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 3 competitors in the [Insert Niche] market. Create a pricing strategy document that highlights an 'undervalued' feature set that can be sold for $49/mo.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap focusing on the specific feature identified in the pricing strategy document.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Revenue Engine
steps.description: Set up your payment gateway integration first. If you can't charge, you haven't built a business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Stripe-integrated Next.js boilerplate that enforces role-based access control based on subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'stripe-node' and 'create a webhook handler for subscription events'

steps.title: Automate the Value Delivery
steps.description: Map your core feature to the pricing tier. The code should reflect the subscription level.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a service layer that restricts API usage limits based on the user's Stripe subscription metadata.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement middleware to check usage quotas against the database before executing core logic'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build features that justify the next pricing tier upgrade.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a feature spec for an 'Enterprise' tier that adds audit logs and SSO capabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the database schema and API endpoints for enterprise-grade audit logging'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion Velocity
steps.description: Refine the UI/UX based on the pricing flow to ensure maximum sign-up conversion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current landing page code and suggest A/B testing variations for the pricing table to increase conversion by 20%.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Refactor the pricing table component to be more mobile-responsive and highlight the annual plan savings'

pro_tips: Always price your MVP higher than you think; it filters out non-serious users and provides better feedback.
Use Stripe's 'Metered Billing' to capture revenue from high-usage power users early on.
Never build a feature that doesn't map directly to an existing pricing tier's value proposition.
Automate your churn recovery emails via your backend logic before you even launch your first feature.
Treat your codebase as an ephemeral asset; if it doesn't support the revenue goal, refactor or delete it.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, run a small ad test to your pricing page, and iterate based on the drop-off rates.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free. Start building for profit. You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
